title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Union Bank of India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
